items.title: Lenovo’s Idea Tab Pro 12.7-inch 3K Android tablet with stylus delivers some serious value while it’s down to $237.50 (40% off)
items.summary:
Over at Lenovo, you’ll find the brand’s Idea Tab Pro Android tablet currently going for $237.49 shipped. Don’t forget to enter promo code EXTRAFIVE during checkout to see the discounted price. This particular tablet, which comes bundled with the Lenovo Tab Pen Plus stylus, typically sells for $390, so you’re looking at a straight-up $152 discount right now. We’ve typically see the brand’s more affordable Idea Tab models score notable price drops, but this Pro model doesn’t see nearly as many discounts. It’s only been discounted once in the past, and today’s offer beats that by $10 to mark a new best price. Best Buy currently lists this base variant for $310 with a lighter discount, but Lenovo’s offer with the above-mentioned promo code knocks a significant chunk off the regular price to land at a new all-time low.

more…

items.title: Originally $1,300 Snapdragon X Elite Surface Laptop with 15-inch 2K touchscreen is down to $900 (Today only, $400 off)
items.summary:
Today only, as part of its Deals of the Day offers, Best Buy has listed Microsoft’s Snapdragon X Elite-powered 15-inch touchscreen Surface Laptop for $899.99 shipped. This is the first Snapdragon X Elite-powered Surface notebook that originally launched with a $1,300 price tag. It has more recently been selling closer to $1,200 at Amazon, so today’s deal delivers a straight $300 discount off its typical going rate. That also marks a $400 drop from its original list price, bringing this touchscreen model down to one of the lowest prices we have tracked to date – now sitting just $72 above its all-time low. It also remains one of the more capable Snapdragon X Elite Surface machines available, offering stronger performance than the 2025 Surface Laptop models that arrived with the more modest 8-core Snapdragon X Plus chip. Head below for more details.

items.title: Philips Sonicare ProtectiveClean 5300 electric toothbrush hits $75 in spring savings, more models + accessories from $8
items.summary:
During Amazon’s ongoing Big Spring Sale event, you can upgrade your oral hygiene routine with up to 39% savings on popular Philips Sonicare electric toothbrushes, as well as replacement heads for various models. My personal pick is the ProtectiveClean 5300 Electric Toothbrush down at $74.95 shipped from its $110 full price. While it has gone lower in the past, you’re looking at a solid 32% markdown here that saves you $35 off the going rate. It features three settings, a two-minute timer, indicator lights, and a two-week battery life per each charge. If you would prefer a cheaper option, I also recommend the 4100 Electric Toothbrush for $45.96 shipped, down from $56. You’ll find even more models and accessories below, starting from $8.

items.title: Mammotion’s RTK robot lawn mowers are ready to take over yard work with up to 29% spring savings at lows from $849
items.summary:
As part of the Amazon Big Spring Sale, Mammotion’s official storefront is getting in on the action with up to 29% savings on its robot mowers. Things start the lowest with the Mammotion YUKA mini 700 Robot Mower at $849 shipped, which parallels the alternate YUKA mini 700H Robot Mower at the same price. These robots tend to go for $1,199 at full price, which we’ve seen discounted multiple times to this rate, while the 700H model has gone a bit lower to $749 once back in September. The deals here give you a $350 markdown off the going rates for the all-time lowest tracked price on the 700, and the second-lowest price on the 700H. You’ll be getting the full RTK autonomous experience here with in-app smart controls, and the difference between the models is cutting height variations – 0.8 to 2.4 inches for the 700, and 2 to 5 inches for the 700H. You’ll find these and more advanced options waiting for you below, as well as alternate deals from other brands in our smart home hub.

items.title: Beatbot’s latest Sora 70 robotic pool cleaner tackles floors, walls, waterline, and more at a new $1,199 low, more from $849
items.summary:
As part of the Amazon Big Spring Sale, as well as the parallel direct Beatbot Spring Sale, you can find the brand’s advanced premium robotic pool cleaners getting up to 40% discounts running through April 5. One notable inclusion is Beatbot’s latest Sora 70 Robotic Pool Cleaner falling to $1,199 shipped for the first time, matching the deal we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. This is the newest robot from the brand that hit the market in mid-February, which we’ve previously seen discounted down to $1,349 up until now. During this sale event that is outlasting Amazon’s overall sale, you’ll be able to score $300 off the tag for a new all-time low. Head below to learn more about it, as well as browse the full lineup of alternate models so you can get all you need for the upcoming swimming season.

items.title: Our Place’s popular 12.7, 31.7, and 32-quart 6-in-1 Wonder Ovens have dropped to return + new lows starting from $129
items.summary:
As part of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, the Our Place official storefront is offering a Prime-exclusive cut to the best price ever on the popular 12.7-Quart Wonder Oven for $129 shipped in all four colorways. Normally going for $185 in full, this popular oven hasn’t seen significant savings in 2026 since mid-January, with discounts before the new year only ever having gone as low as $140. Now, during this sale event, you’re getting a larger-than-ever 30% markdown off the going rate, giving you back $56 in savings and landing it down at a new all-time low price. You can also find its 31.7-Quart variants starting from a new $175 low, down from $245, as well as the latest 32-Quart Wonder Oven Pro models down at their $275 lows for the first time since Black Friday. You can also browse the full lineup of Our Place spring deals here.
